mapper.select: SELECT z.zone_id AS zoneId, -- (수정) 중복 방지를 위해 DISTINCT 추가 COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) AS workerCount, 0.0 AS progressRate, 'STABLE' AS status FROM zones z -- 관리자가 배정한 구역의 작업자만 조인 LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- 그 작업자가 현재 출근 중(ended_at IS NULL)인지 확인 LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ORDER BY z.zone_id

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, ( SELECT COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id) FROM batch_tasks bt JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id WHERE bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bti.status != 'PENDING' AND DATE(bti.last_scanned_at) = CURDATE() ) AS workCount, 0.0 AS processingSpeed, 0.0 AS currentTaskProgress, 'WORKING' AS status, 'AVAILABLE' AS webrtcStatus FROM users u INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}
